# feat(kaizen): SPEC-04 BaseAgent slimming — 2103 → 859 LOC

<!-- Generated by SessionEnd hook from a commit matching a journal-worthy pattern.
     Next session: review, then promote to a real journal entry OR delete. -->

**Commit**: `911a103726eb` — feat(kaizen): SPEC-04 BaseAgent slimming — 2103 → 859 LOC

**Body**:

A parallel-worktree merge from the prior session silently regressed
base_agent.py from 994 LOC back to 2103 by re-inlining 1079 lines of
MCPMixin methods that had been properly extracted. The line-count
invariant test existed but was never run against the regressed state.

This commit restores the slimming and goes further:

- Delete 1079-line shadow MCP block (14 methods already in MCPMixin)
- Eliminate extension point shim layer (_invoke_extension_point
  dispatcher, 7 _*_impl methods, 7 @deprecated wrappers,
  __init_subclass__ deprecation scanner) — extension points are now
  direct methods, subclass overrides win via normal Python MRO
- Replace 7 _apply_*_mixin shim methods with data-driven loop
- Remove **kwargs catch-all from __init__ (closes §10.2)
- Add posture immutability guard on BaseAgentConfig (closes §10.3)
- Replace _simple_execute placeholder with NotImplementedError
- Add error handling to mixin import loop
- Fix: add respx dev dependency, register regression pytest marker

485 core unit tests pass, 0 regressions vs baseline of 481.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
